mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications ( user_id, type, message, target_url ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{type}, #{message}, #{targetUrl} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, type, message, target_url, is_read, created_at FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = false
